headline_seed: NEW: Former Virginia Lt. Gov. Justin Fairfax fatally shot his wife before dying by suicide, as police say the couple was going through a "messy divorce." The shooting happened shortly after midnight at the couple’s house while their two teenage children were home, @GriffJenkins
draft_text:
#BreakingMews
Former Virginia Lt. Gov. Justin Fairfax shot and killed his wife Cerina, then himself, in their Annandale home just after midnight Thursday. Both teenage children were home. Reuters and NBC News confirm.

And that's the mews.
